description: My overall experience is , great actually nice templates, easy to manage social plugins and nice interface.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Everything is exceptionally simple to utilize. Its actual basic, no compelling reason to recruit someone to make an e-shop. Great mix with other applications( conveyance techniques, installment strategies.
cons: Hanging tight for a refinement of potential outcomes (pictures inside the content, for instance, when composing a blog), opportunities for word processing and text style adding.

review_title: Modern platform for building either your website or online store
description: This is the local company (from Estonia), so when I first started to look for the ready made website templates to build my own company website on then this was one of the obvious choices.
author: Paul T.
pros: Easy to implement and set-up. Logical back-office.
cons: When you make changes to the main code then you should consider that mobile views might be not in the perfect alignment, so additional coding is then needed to fix this

author: Silja L.
pros: Easy to use, clear and good customer support
cons: Not enough links with other very important service providers

review_title: Easy and customizable webpage building system
description: Webpage has functioned without flaws and is very easy to use.
author: Kerli H.
pros: Fast setup time and easy webshop tools, which are recently changed for the better.
cons: The webshop options could be updated, like the dynamic prices for product pages for example.

description: It is easy to use as a online learning platform as well for informational purpose.
author: Grete E.
pros: Voog is easy to use for people without previous knowledge and experience in building homepage for your company. Voog has good help service and frequently asked questions section to help users. Voog is affordable for small companies. Desings have multible options and are easy to modify to your own liking.
cons: E-shop should have opurtunity to list products in variations the way that it shows spesific picture to client after choosing your product (for example if you choose dress color, you can connect picture of this specific product to variation).

author: Jane K.
pros: Easy to use, design templates are good. Very good customer support.
cons: I cannot find often buttons to change the design.

review_title: All essential is there and works
author: Inger U.
pros: Very easy to use and e-shop or webpage is up and running in very short time.
cons: I would love if designing would be easier and would give more opportunities on page type (using templates). I mean that not all is rearrangeable in way you wish. For example if I want I could put a picture whereever I want and text wherever I want. At the moment there are only designates plasces where to put these.

author: Alexander M.
pros: Voog is easy to use for someone who knows little about setting up webpages (like myself). Setting up my homepage and blog took very little time and I've not had any issues over the last 3 years of using it.
cons: The blog features and SEO tools are not as advanced as I'm used to. But I know they are working on them.

author: Sarah E.
pros: Great design options, easy to use, fast and helpful customer support, good pricing.
cons: - Discount options, there should be more options. For example discounts for special categories and possibility to have both discount code and free transport for products. As well the possibility to give all products one discount(whole shop/category -15% ). - There is no possibility to change all products at once. All changes take lots of time. - Also in product names there should be opportunity to insert price, which should have different color or be in bold. It should be a bit separate from the product name.

description: As for someone who wants to run his homepage by himself it's recommended as it's easy to use. I am still happy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is easy to start the page and create something simple and looking fancy enough. It is also easy to use and fill in the information. Customer support is always with you by helping which makes things even easier.
cons: I would personally like more options to change the outlook, design elements, and plugins.

author: Grete N.
pros: Easy to use. Everything is simple, nice, minimalistic.
cons: I would like to have more space (I mostly upload photos of art and design). And I would like to have more fonts or upload my own.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall experience is satisfactory - I have a basic web page and web shop, but I have come into obstacles when I have wanted to make some specific things on the web page/web shop.
author: Veiko I.
pros: That you do not need much it skills to set up a basic web page and web shop.
cons: Some layout features that I needed are not possible. Also, it would be good if the mobile view would automatically adjust to mobile, not that I need to test on the desktop view what needs to be changed so that it would also look ok on mobile view.

author: Maris A.
pros: Voog is easy to use. All necessary features for starting e-shop are in place and easy to implement. Also customer service is in Estonian so it is really easy to describe my problems.
cons: There could be easier way to manage pictures in e-shop. If you have big number of pictures it is hard to work with them only in bottom bar. (there could be better way but i have not found it)

description: Our website has already been in edicy 7 years and everything seems to be very easy, it´s really easy to use to create tour website also it is very simple to add e-shop.
author: Maria O.
pros: The e-shop is very easy to build. Edicy also have really good desgins to pick.
cons: Some designs are difficult to change on your own way

description: At the moment, the website contains general information about the company.
author: Sigrid N.
pros: The program is generally simple and convenient to use. It would be good if videos could be added in the same way as photos. Text color (for example, from black to blue) - The blue text color disappears when, for example, you add a link.
cons: the ability to add videos is a bit complicated (ex. from facebook). It would be good if videos could be added in the same way as photos. Text color (for example, from black to blue) - The blue text color disappears when, for example, you add a link. Currently i have been looking at Groove Funnel options and options.

review_title: Simple software for every kind of business
author: Mario A.
pros: Easy to use, simple design, integrates with other apps, overall it has a good quality and price rate.
cons: I miss the filtering option which is one of the most frequently used option by customers when you are keeping an online store for clothes and footwear.

author: Riin R.
pros: Very easy to use, no need of any developer skills. SEO is very easy to fill in.
cons: No possibility to create discounts, only with coupons. Not login method to retarget customers who didnt bought, but left product in the basket. Would like to see more e-store themes. Also more features would be awesome. Also to create drag and drop method for popular products or discounted products, that could be added on the first page. At the moment I did it manually. E-mails from contact forms are coming through and are visible in my e-mail after 3 hours. Please make it possible to answer in the system. because in the email I still have to copy the customer email and answer separately.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have small art/handcraft business, I´m using e-shop options.
author: Hele L.
pros: Simple to use. Developing all the time. Automatically makes a bill for customer. Easy to add payment options
cons: Waiting for a sophistication of possibilities (pictures inside the text, for example, when writing a blog), possibilities for text editing and font adding

description: This platform is best for my business. Easy, fast and convenient to use!
author: Elen K.
pros: For me easy to use and at the moment I don´t have special expectations.
cons: Suggestion: All Voog packages could include SEO tools!

author: Villu K.
pros: eesy ang good support. eesy to setup bils.
cons: mby more options for e-shop redy themes.

description: I use it for photography portfolio. It's really easy to use and looks great.
author: Keith V.
pros: Really easy to use and fast website setup.
cons: Going back or undoing some actions were difficult on website, when messing something up.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kristo U.
pros: Its simple software. I like items stock system
cons: Biggest problem for me is that I can't use Montonio in voog

description: Company sales have increased using Voog.
author: Christine J.
pros: Everything is very easy to use. Its very simple, no need to hire somebody to make a e-shop. Good integration with other apps( delivery methods, payment methods.
cons: This is my first e-shop, i havent used another platforms. Im satisfied, its hard to say something which would require development.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We needed webshop. It was easiet way to do that.
author: Ülle P.
pros: It is easy to use. Support from team is excellent. Everything is in Estonian, that's great.
cons: Everything was understandable. If there was something incomprehensible I asked from support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Katrina K.
pros: It is easy to use, webpage can be set-up really fast, resources and help
cons: Lack of options in the standard look; more flexibility would be fantastic
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
